title: Hot Reload and Debugging
description: Learn how to use hot reload for fast iteration and basic debugging.

slides.title: Hot Reload vs Hot Restart 🔥
slides.content:
# Speed Up Development

* **Hot Reload** – Updates the UI instantly while preserving state. Great for small changes.
* **Hot Restart** – Completely restarts the app, resetting state. Use for major changes.

Press `r` in the terminal for hot reload, `R` for hot restart.

quizData.question: Which action preserves the current app state?
quizData.explanation: Hot reload updates the UI without rebuilding the entire app state.

slides.title: Debugging with print()
slides.content: Add print statements to see values in the console:

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use `debugPrint` for long outputs

`debugPrint` from `package:flutter/foundation.dart` throttles output to avoid being dropped by the system.
